displayTitle: Legends Epic Collection: The Clone Wars Vol. 4
synopsis: Collects Free Comic Book Day 2005: Star Wars #1; Star Wars: Darth Maul – Son of Dathomir (2014) #1-4; Star Wars: Republic (2002) #74-77 & 81-83; Star Wars: Episode III – Revenge of the Sith (2005) #1-4; Star Wars: Tag & Bink II (2006) #2; and material from Star Wars Visionaries (2005) #1 and Star Wars Tales (1999) #4
title: Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The Clone Wars Vol. 4
